span.p: Portfolio for the consultant's own marketing site?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Case A — Portfolio
Evidence.dev OSS
Static deploy

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Client already has a BI tool — needs only data pipes?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Case D — Pipes only
Airbyte + Postgres + dbt
No dashboard framework

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: One-off custom dashboard inside the client's app?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Case B — Microsoft variant
Power BI Embedded F2 ~$262/mo
App-Owns-Data + DAX-role RLS

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Case B — OSS variant
Superset or Metabase OSS
VPS $20-40/mo + Postgres RLS + JWT embed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Multi-tenant product to sell to many customers?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Case C — Productized SaaS
Cube OSS + custom React
Postgres RLS

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
None of A/B/C/D fit
Escalate to ravenclaude-core/architect
